data.title: Central China Securities Sets Board Meeting to Approve First-Quarter 2026 Results
data.description:

Central China Securities Co., Ltd. Class H ( (HK:1375) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Central China Securities has scheduled a board meeting for 29 April 2026 to review and approve the group’s first-quarter results for the period ended 31 March 2026 and to authorise their publication. The announcement signals the upcoming disclosure of the firm’s early 2026 financial performance, which will be closely watched by investors assessing its operating momentum and outlook in China’s securities sector.

The board is chaired by Zhang Qiuyun and includes a mix of executive and independent non-executive directors, underscoring standard corporate governance practices for a Hong Kong-listed financial institution. The forthcoming results may provide insight into trading conditions and fee income trends across the company’s core securities businesses in both mainland China and Hong Kong.

More about Central China Securities Co., Ltd. Class H

Central China Securities Co., Ltd., listed in Hong Kong, is a Henan-based securities firm providing brokerage, investment banking and related financial services in mainland China and Hong Kong. The company operates through various subsidiaries and focuses on serving capital markets and investors in the People’s Republic of China.

Average Trading Volume: 10,907,100

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: HK$18.33B

data.title: CRH Continues $300m Buyback With New U.S. Share Repurchases
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An update from CRH plc ( (CRH) ) is now available.

CRH has repurchased 100 of its own ordinary shares in the U.S. market on 16 April 2026 through Wells Fargo Securities at a volume-weighted average price of $114.6485 per share, with all acquired shares to be cancelled. The buyback forms part of CRH’s previously announced plan to repurchase up to $300 million of stock by 28 April 2026, leaving 668,200,414 shares in issue and 35,634,977 shares held in treasury, a move that modestly tightens its free float and underlines ongoing capital return to shareholders.

The latest tranche of buybacks, executed across multiple trading venues including BATS, INCR, KNLI, LEVL and MEMX, reflects CRH’s continued use of balance sheet capacity to support its share price and optimise capital structure. By maintaining treasury shares at just over 5% of issued capital and cancelling repurchased stock, the company signals confidence in its long-term prospects while providing incremental earnings-per-share support for investors.

More about CRH plc

CRH plc is a global building materials group supplying cement, aggregates, ready-mixed concrete and asphalt, along with related construction products and services. The company operates across key infrastructure, residential and commercial markets, with a significant presence in both Europe and North America, and its shares are listed and actively traded in the United States.

See more insights into CRH stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

Heavy Minerals Ltd ( (AU:HVY) ) has issued an announcement.

Heavy Minerals Limited has issued 125,000 fully paid ordinary shares without a prospectus under the Corporations Act’s provisions for secondary share issues. The company states it remains compliant with its continuous disclosure and financial reporting obligations and confirms there is no excluded or undisclosed information relevant to this share issue.

The announcement is largely administrative in nature, signalling a modest equity issuance that marginally expands the company’s capital base. For investors, the notice clarifies that the new shares were issued under standard Australian regulatory exemptions and that the underlying mineral resource assumptions across its key projects remain unchanged.

More about Heavy Minerals Ltd

Heavy Minerals Limited is an Australian-listed industrial minerals exploration company focused on garnet, zircon, rutile and ilmenite. Its primary assets are the Port Gregory and Red Hill garnet projects in Western Australia, alongside the Inhambane Heavy Mineral Project in Mozambique, all of which host significant JORC-compliant mineral resources or exploration targets.

data.title: Clas Ohlson Schedules June 2026 Capital Markets Day to Outline Strategy
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest announcement is out from Clas Ohlson AB ( ($SE:CLAS.B) ).

Clas Ohlson AB, the Swedish home improvement retailer founded in 1918, has grown from a mail-order business in Insjön to a multi-market chain with around 5,000 employees and roughly SEK 12 billion in annual sales. The company, listed on Nasdaq Stockholm, focuses on practical, sustainable products that help consumers fix and improve their homes at attractive prices.

The company has invited investors, analysts and financial media to a Capital Markets Day in Stockholm on 3 June 2026, with both on-site and digital participation options. Senior management, led by President and CEO Kristofer Tonström, will present an in-depth overview of Clas Ohlson’s strategy and future development, with English-language presentations and Q&A, underscoring its effort to enhance transparency and engagement with capital markets stakeholders.

The event will be hosted in the Inderes Studio in central Stockholm and run from early afternoon to late afternoon Central European Summer Time. Presentation materials and a recording will be published afterward on the company’s website, broadening access for investors and analysts who cannot attend live and reinforcing the retailer’s communication around its strategic direction.

The most recent analyst rating on ($SE:CLAS.B) stock is a Sell with a SEK335.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Clas Ohlson AB stock, see the SE:CLAS.B Stock Forecast page.

More about Clas Ohlson AB

Clas Ohlson AB is a Swedish retail company founded in 1918 as a mail-order business in Insjön and now operates in multiple markets with around 5,000 employees and annual sales of about SEK 12 billion. Listed on Nasdaq Stockholm, the group focuses on practical and sustainable home-fixing solutions at attractive prices, aiming to make home improvement accessible and enjoyable for a broad customer base.

The company’s assortment and positioning target everyday household needs, combining value-driven pricing with an emphasis on sustainability and convenience. Its multi-market footprint and established brand in home improvement retail support its growth strategy and visibility among Nordic and international investors.

Average Trading Volume: 103,759

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: SEK25.43B

data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

ACSL Ltd. ( (JP:6232) ) has shared an announcement.

ACSL Ltd. has approved the issuance of stock acquisition rights as stock options for 14 employees, allocating a total of 220 units that can be converted into 22,000 shares of common stock. The exercise price has been set at 170,400 yen per stock acquisition right, equivalent to 1,704 yen per share, underscoring a targeted effort to align employee incentives with shareholder value and strengthen long-term retention.

The move signals ACSL’s intention to foster stronger employee commitment at a time when competition for skilled talent in advanced technology fields is intensifying. By linking compensation more closely to the company’s share performance, ACSL aims to motivate key personnel to drive growth and innovation, which could enhance its competitive position and create a tighter alignment of interests among staff, management, and investors.

More about ACSL Ltd.

ACSL Ltd. operates in the technology sector, focusing on providing unmanned systems and related solutions. The company’s business model typically involves developing and deploying advanced hardware and software platforms that support industrial and commercial applications, positioning it to benefit from growing demand for automation and robotics.

data.title: 1414 Degrees Issues 93.7 Million New Shares to Support Clean-Energy Growth Platform
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

1414 Degrees Ltd. ( (AU:14D) ) has issued an announcement.

1414 Degrees Ltd has issued 93,672,099 fully paid ordinary shares without a prospectus, confirming it remains compliant with continuous disclosure and financial reporting obligations under the Corporations Act. The company also stated it is not aware of any excluded information that would need to be disclosed to investors in relation to this share issue.

The share issuance supports 1414 Degrees’ broader strategy of developing its integrated clean-energy and decarbonisation platform, anchored by the Aurora Energy Precinct in South Australia. With grid access, development approvals and a near-term 140 MW/280 MWh battery storage project, the company is positioning itself as an infrastructure and technology provider to large-scale, low-emissions power users, including potential data centre and industrial customers.

More about 1414 Degrees Ltd.

1414 Degrees Ltd is an Australian clean-energy and industrial decarbonisation company focused on grid-scale energy storage, industrial heat, hydrogen production and advanced battery materials. It owns the 16km² Aurora Energy Precinct in South Australia, positioned within the Upper Spencer Gulf Renewable Energy Zone to supply firmed renewable power to data centres and other energy-intensive industries. The company’s core technologies, including SiBrick, SiBox, SiPHyR and SiNTL, use silicon-based systems to store, convert and enhance energy across multiple sectors.

data.title: Unidata Reopens Board of Statutory Auditors Slate Deadline to Boost Shareholder Participation
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Unidata S.P.A. ( (IT:UD) ) has shared an update.

Unidata S.p.A., the Rome-based telecoms, cloud and IoT provider listed on Euronext Milan’s STAR Segment, has called a shareholders’ meeting for 11 May 2026 to appoint a new Board of Statutory Auditors. After the original 16 April 2026 deadline, only one slate of candidates was filed by majority shareholder Uninvest S.r.l., triggering a regulated extension.

Under Italian market rules, the company has reopened the window for submitting additional slates until 19 April 2026, cutting the minimum shareholding threshold in half to 1.25%. The move is intended to encourage broader shareholder participation in shaping the oversight body, with all slates and related documents to be made publicly available via Unidata’s registered office, authorized storage system and corporate website.

The most recent analyst rating on (IT:UD) stock is a Buy with a EUR4.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Unidata S.P.A. stock, see the IT:UD Stock Forecast page.

More about Unidata S.P.A.

Unidata S.p.A. is an Italian telecommunications, cloud and IoT operator founded in 1985 and listed on the Euronext Milan – STAR Segment. The company operates an 8,500 km and growing fiber network, a wireless network and a proprietary data center, serving over 31,000 business, wholesale and residential customers with ultra-broadband, VoIP, cloud and smart home and smart city IoT solutions.

Average Trading Volume: 73,828

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: €84.63M
